text:
Created attachment 170483
patch with update to 1.12.6

Hello,

attached a patch to update the port to its current version. Buildtests are fine for 9.3, 10.0, 10.2 and 10.3 amd64 and i386. They fail for current because of build-problems with devel/jsoncpp.

I also played a while to be sure everything is fine. ;)

Greetings,
Torsten
